title: Empty patch behavior in message_set_update is undocumented
description: message_set_update (message.rs:147-202) conditionally builds a patch by adding only non-None fields. If all optional fields are None and reaction_changes is empty, it sends {} (empty object). Tests 30-31 verify this works, but there is no doc explaining 'An empty patch is valid and sends {}'. A future maintainer reading the conditional logic might misinterpret the empty patch as a no-op or error case and attempt to 'fix' it. Document the expected behavior: all-None input -> {} patch -> server no-op.
close_reason: Documented empty-patch no-op semantics in message_set_update doc comment
